metaBuilds.title: AP Brawler
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 25 — about 2,699 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: AP Burst
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 1,230 damage in one combo in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: AP Frontline
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 25 — about 6,140 effective HP vs physical in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention. Boris deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Orion: their 3s all-in loses 24% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.
